title: Pawn Plug
setup: A pawn on **d7** plugs the king's escape down the file, and your king on **d6** holds the diagonals.
hint: Sweep the rook to the 8th rank — the **d7** pawn freezes the king on **d8**.
explanation:
## The Idea

A cute **rook + pawn mate**. The d7 pawn isn't checking — but it stops the Black king from running to d7 or even capturing your king's defender.

Play {{Ra8#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- {{c8}} and {{e8}} — covered by the rook on a8
- {{c7}}, {{e7}} — both controlled by your king on **d6**
- {{d7}} — blocked by your own pawn (and also defended by your king)
- {{Kxd7}} would be illegal anyway because your king on **d6** defends d7
- Nothing can interpose on the empty 8th rank

> **Takeaway:** Even a *humble pawn* can be the deciding factor in a mating net. When promoting near an enemy king, don't always rush to a queen — sometimes the pawn itself is the most useful blocker.
